title: Mobile user has few headsets, some disconnected
scenario: Lens tenant correctly reflects active (green) and disconnected (red/inactive) status for multiple paired headsets across Inventory, Device Profile, and User Profile pages
steps: 1. Open the Poly Lens tenant web portal and navigate to the Inventory page.
2. Pair 3 or more Poly Bluetooth headsets to a mobile device running the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Ensure at least one headset is actively connected (powered on and paired).
4. Turn off or unpair at least one of the other headsets so it is in a disconnected state.
5. Observe the status indicators on the Inventory page for each headset.
6. Navigate to the Inventory/Device Profile page for each headset.
7. Observe the status indicators on the Device Profile page.
8. Navigate to the Device Users/User Profile page.
9. Observe the status indicators on the User Profile page.
expected: On the Inventory page, Inventory/Device Profile page, and Device Users/User Profile page, actively connected headsets display a green status mark, while disconnected headsets (turned off or unpaired) display a red/inactive status mark.
